div.div: 松しょう氏の単独ライブから

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(225, 245, 254), rgb(15, 33, 40)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(129, 212, 250), rgb(9, 80, 113));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 718px; height: 1px; padding-top: 324px; margin-left: 26px;

div.div: 発起人：松しょう氏の哲学

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(16, 115, 158), rgb(84, 169, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 394px; margin-left: 5px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(221, 221, 221), rgb(47, 47, 47));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 482px; height: 1px; padding-top: 379px; margin-left: 254px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1994年2月、誰もいない入間市「新しきを知る公園」で、たった一人の「観客兼演者」として歌い始めたのが全ての始まり。
既存のホールではなく、公共空間を「音楽の場」に変える試み。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(242, 159, 5), rgb(160, 89, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 474px; margin-left: 5px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: コミュニティ・ビルダー

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(221, 221, 221), rgb(47, 47, 47));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 482px; height: 1px; padding-top: 459px; margin-left: 254px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
カリスマ的指導者ではなく、自らが楽しむ姿を見せることで周囲を巻き込むスタイル。
「松仲良（まつなかよし）」という別名の通り、人と人をつなぐ触媒として機能した。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 243, 224), rgb(36, 26, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 204, 128), rgb(97, 53, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 718px; height: 1px; padding-top: 564px; margin-left: 26px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: イベントの歴史的変遷

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(16, 115, 158), rgb(84, 169, 206)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 入間市「新しきを知る公園」にて開始。当初は出演者＝松しょう氏のみ。

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(94, 164, 88), rgb(71, 131, 66)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 48px; height: 1px; padding-top: 719px; margin-left: 40px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 709px; margin-left: 116px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 731px; margin-left: 116px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 口コミで出演者が増加。中津川フォークジャンボリーの精神を継承しつつ、過激な政治性よりも「生活の中の音楽」を重視する独自のスタイルを確立。

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(242, 159, 5), rgb(160, 89, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 58px; height: 1px; padding-top: 814px; margin-left: 35px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 799px; margin-left: 116px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 821px; margin-left: 116px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 14年の歴史に一区切り。第100回記念開催をもって「入間川フォークジャンボリー」としては終了。しかしコミュニティは解散せず。

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(102, 102, 102), rgb(149, 149, 149)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 48px; height: 1px; padding-top: 899px; margin-left: 40px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 889px; margin-left: 116px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 【継承】入間サウンドヘヴンへ

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 911px; margin-left: 116px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
後継イベント「入間サウンドヘヴン」へと精神が引き継がれる。
2026年3月にも松しょう氏のライブが予定されており、活動は現在進行形。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 738px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1009px; margin-left: 5px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #F29F05;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#F29F05, #a05900); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 結論：地域文化資産としての価値

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 692px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1054px; margin-left: 28px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
入間川フォークジャンボリーは、1970年代の政治的な「祭りの季節」の精神を受け継ぎながらも、
それを「日常のコミュニティ」へと昇華させた稀有な事例である。
14年間継続したという事実は、一人の情熱が地域文化を変えうることを証明している。
